title: Planet Labs Q2 FY2026 Financial Results Record Revenue
text: Planet delivered record second-quarter revenue of $73.4 million, representing 20% year-over-year growth. The company achieved 98% recurring annual contract value, demonstrating strong customer retention. Gross margin improved to 58% compared to 53% in the prior year, with non-GAAP gross margin at 61%. The company reported adjusted EBITDA profitability of $6.4 million, marking the third consecutive quarter of adjusted EBITDA profitability. Net loss narrowed to $22.6 million versus $38.7 million year-over-year. Planet ended the quarter with $271.5 million in cash and short-term investments. Year-to-date free cash flow totaled $54.3 million, with operating cash flow at $85.1 million. The company reported significant backlog growth, with remaining performance obligations surging 516% to $690.1 million and total backlog increasing 245% to $736.1 million. For full fiscal year 2026, Planet projects revenue between $281-289 million with non-GAAP gross margins of 55-57%. Notable recent wins include a €240 million German-funded satellite services deal and NATO contracts, alongside expanded agreements with the U.S. Department of Defense and National Reconnaissance Office.
